name: Beardsell Limited
summary: Beardsell Limited is involved in building products such as EPS (Expanded Polystyrene) and EPP (Expanded Polypropylene) products along with textiles; the company is based in Chennai, India. Their business segments include manufacture and trading of EPS/EPP products, textiles, and related activities. They offer a range of solutions in thermal insulation, packaging, and textile applications.
